component.name: linuxcloth
component.summary: Launch catalog services in disposable Windows virtual machines

description.p: linuxcloth is a Linux-native catalog and session launcher for services that require Windows software. It creates a per-session qcow2 overlay and starts Windows through QEMU/KVM without sharing host folders by default.
Users provide their own licensed Windows installation media and virtio-win driver media. Windows media, product keys, and generated virtual-machine images are not distributed with linuxcloth.
